title: Precision Hardened Spur Gears
short_desc: High-torque heavy transmission spur gears designed for intense impact load profiles across processing lines.

specs.Dimensions: Up to Ø 1,500 mm max bounds

title: Stepped Ground Drive Shafts
short_desc: Engineered for minimal runout and maximum structural longevity with specialized keyway configurations.

specs.Tolerances: Strict h6 to g6 micron sizing

title: Phosphor Bronze Sleeve Bushes
short_desc: High-grade, low-friction anti-wear sliding sleeves designed to handle sustained heavy radial loads.

specs.Dimensions: Turning up to Ø 600 mm max OD

title: Heavy Machinery Spare Parts
short_desc: Specialized high-durability replacement parts designed from broken physical masters or raw geometries.
